message:
🐛 Fix "Ai" capitalization to "AI" in Console AI card titles (#248)

Add 'ai' to the ACRONYMS set in formatCardTitle so card types like
console_ai_issues render as "Console AI Issues" instead of "Console Ai Issues".
Also consolidate duplicate formatCardType functions in CardHistory and
SidebarCustomizer to use the shared formatCardTitle utility.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
